name: @codesetu/jetbrains
description: JetBrains plugin for CodeSetu. This Kotlin/Gradle project is integrated into the pnpm workspace via thin script delegations — actual build/test runs through Gradle.

scripts.build: echo 'JetBrains plugin: run ./gradlew buildPlugin from this directory (requires JDK 17+).'
scripts.lint: echo 'JetBrains plugin: lint is handled by Gradle/IntelliJ; no Node-side linting.'
scripts.test: echo 'JetBrains plugin: run ./gradlew test from this directory.'
